title: Not Enough Biomes
description: A modpack that add lofs of biomes and structures. Also make world bigger and richer.
body:
# Not Enough Biomes
This simple modpack added lots of biomes and structures. Make the world bigger and richer. 

Include YUNG's mods, all of Terraformers' mods, most of [Let's go]mods, Fabric season mods and more.

There are Hundreds of structures and biomes, Countless treasure chests are waiting for you.

Improve yourself, there's powerful bosses are waitting!

Let's start, Immerse yourself in Minecraft！

Pics:
![neither](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/a8yJmkyj/images/812b377b273c9d2e6d4037b87f7ffc7d369f1cac.png)
